## STOP — Do Not Report Security Vulnerabilities Here

Public GitHub issues are visible to everyone immediately.

**For security vulnerabilities, email security@zhilicon.ai instead.**

Include:
- Description and impact
- Steps to reproduce
- SDK version and environment
- Proof-of-concept code (if safe to share)

See [SECURITY.md](../../SECURITY.md) for our full responsible disclosure policy and response timeline.

---
